items.title: 一个严肃的话题：人如何活久点？
items.summary: 我前一阵子研究了一下复利，注意到活得越久，复利带来的资金越多。大部分的人如果用 100w 买 QQQ ，活得越久，就可以财务自由了，几乎人人都可以成为亿万富翁。那我的问题是，如何活得久点呢？

items.title: The Sword of Damocles at Work: The Human Cost of Delayed Layoffs
items.summary: Over a decade ago, my employer announced layoffs that would happen in waves. Every few months another round arrived. Nobody knew the criteria, who would be affected next, or when. The uncertainty was exhausting and took a toll on everyone. This week, Xbox announced a similar plan, and it brought those memories back.
